runtime.title: Live / Paper Runtime Status
runtime.subtitle: Monitor background work, connector health, mandates, and risk controls from one operations workspace.
runtime.subtitlePost: . This page does not authorize connectors, start runners, stop runners, submit orders, cancel orders, or change mandates.
runtime.unavailableHint: Treat connector runtime as unavailable until the backend provides a current status snapshot.
runtime.noProfilesBody: The backend did not return any recognized live or paper broker profiles.
runtime.riskHaltedDesc: The kill switch is tripped for this profile. Treat connector runtime as stopped until status clears.
runtime.riskActiveDesc: Runner is alive and an unexpired mandate is present. This page is still read-only status only.
runtime.riskIdleDesc: Authorization and mandate are present, but the runner is not alive.
runtime.riskDormantDesc: Connector runtime is not ready for autonomous operation because authorization, mandate, or runner liveness is missing.
runtime.connectorDescription: Authorization, runner liveness, mandates, and active risk controls for configured broker profiles.
runtime.jobsDescription: Track Agent runs, knowledge ingestion, web collection, and long-running backtests in one queue.
runtime.noJobsDescription: New Agent, ingestion, collection, and backtest work will appear here.
runtime.noErrorDetails: No error was reported for this job.
runtime.cancelConfirmBody: Cancellation stops pending work after the current safe checkpoint. Completed work is retained.
runtime.durableDescription: Unified queue view for Agent runs, RAG ingestion, web crawling, and long backtests. Backends can feed this from Redis or PostgreSQL durable jobs.
runtime.noDurableMatches: No durable jobs match the current filters.

admin.title: Admin Console
admin.subtitle: Monitor organization governance, model inventory, knowledge assets, runtime jobs, audit events, and model usage from one operational surface.
admin.recentAuditDesc: Latest organization-scoped administrative and Agent governance events.
admin.recordsDesc: Filter members, model providers, knowledge bases, jobs, audit events, and usage records for direct operations.
admin.noRecordMatches: No governance records match the current filters.

reports.title: Backtest Report Library
reports.subtitle: Browse historical backtest reports, metrics, and run details from one place.
reports.workspaceDescription: Filter, inspect, and compare backtest evidence without leaving the report library.
reports.searchPlaceholder: Search run id, prompt, symbol, status...
reports.emptyBody: Create a backtest from Agent, then return here to review it.
reports.noMatchesBody: Adjust your search query, status filter, or date range.
reports.analyticsDescription: Summarize the current report view by performance, status, and return distribution.

welcome.title: Hyper Trading Agent
welcome.subtitle: Commercial financial research with an agent team
welcome.describePrompt: Describe a trading strategy to get started.
welcome.tabHint: Switch categories without leaving the composer

examples.crossMarketPortfolioDesc: A-shares portfolio optimization with risk-parity optimizer
examples.crossMarketPortfolioPrompt: Build a risk-parity portfolio with 000001.SZ, 600519.SH, 000858.SZ, backtest for the full year of 2024, and compare with equal-weighted benchmark
examples.btcMacdPrompt: Backtest MACD strategy on 000001.SZ 5-minute bars: fast=12, slow=26, signal=9, last 30 days
examples.usTechMaxDivPrompt: Backtest the maximum diversification portfolio for 600519.SH, 000858.SZ, 601318.SH, 000001.SZ, 600036.SH for the full year of 2024
examples.multiFactorAlphaPrompt: Build a multi-factor alpha model using momentum, reversal, volatility, and turnover on CSI 300 constituents with IC-weighted factor synthesis, backtest 2023-2024
examples.optionsGreeksPrompt: Calculate option Greeks using Black-Scholes: spot=100, strike=105, risk-free rate=3%, vol=25%, expiry=90 days, analyze Delta/Gamma/Theta/Vega
examples.investmentCommitteeDesc: Multi-agent debate: long vs short, risk review, PM decision
examples.investmentCommitteePrompt: [Swarm Team Mode] Use the investment_committee preset to evaluate whether to go long or short on 600519.SH given current market conditions
examples.quantStrategyDeskDesc: Screening → factor research → backtest → risk audit pipeline
examples.quantStrategyDeskPrompt: [Swarm Team Mode] Use the quant_strategy_desk preset to find and backtest the best momentum strategy on CSI 300 constituents
examples.earningsReportDesc: Upload a PDF and ask questions about the financials
examples.earningsReportPrompt: Summarize the key financial metrics, risks, and outlook from the uploaded earnings report
examples.macroResearchDesc: Macro analysis and A-share market outlook
examples.macroResearchPrompt: Read the latest central bank monetary policy report and summarize its impact on the A-share market
examples.analyzeBrokerExportDesc: Parse 同花顺/东财/富途/generic CSV — holding days, win rate, PnL ratio, hourly distribution
examples.analyzeBrokerExportPrompt: Analyze the trade journal I just uploaded — full profile with holding stats, win rate, top symbols, and hourly distribution
examples.diagnoseBehaviorDesc: Disposition effect, overtrading, chasing momentum, anchoring — severity + numeric evidence
examples.diagnoseBehaviorPrompt: Run the 4 behavior diagnostics on my trade journal (disposition, overtrading, chasing, anchoring) and tell me which bias hurts my PnL most
examples.checkConnectorDesc: List connector profiles and verify the selected one
examples.checkConnectorPrompt: List my trading connector profiles, show which one is selected, then check that selected connector. If it is not ready, tell me exactly what setup step is missing. Do not place or modify orders.
examples.analyzePortfolioDesc: Read account summary and positions from the selected connector
examples.analyzePortfolioPrompt: Use the selected trading connector profile to summarize my account, positions, concentration, cash, and portfolio risk. Do not place or modify orders.
examples.quoteTrendDesc: Fetch a quote plus recent daily bars through the selected connector
examples.quoteTrendPrompt: Use the selected trading connector to fetch a 600519.SH quote and 30 daily bars, then summarize the current quote versus the recent trend. Keep it read-only.
examples.trainShadowDesc: Extract your strategy rules from a broker CSV and persist a Shadow profile
examples.trainShadowPrompt: Train my shadow account from the trading journal I just uploaded — show the extracted rules and confirm they look like my behavior
examples.shadowDelta: How Much Am I Leaving on the Table?
examples.shadowDeltaDesc: Backtest your shadow strategy and attribute delta vs. your actual PnL
examples.shadowDeltaPrompt: Run a shadow backtest for the last 90 days and break down where my PnL diverged from the shadow (rule violations, early exits, missed signals)
examples.shadowReportDesc: 8-section HTML/PDF — equity curve, per-market Sharpe, attribution waterfall
examples.shadowReportPrompt: Render the shadow report and give me the URL — lead with the you-vs-shadow delta

settings.title: Settings
settings.authDesc: Enter the API auth key to unlock settings.
settings.reasoningEffortDesc: How hard the model thinks before answering. Higher is more thorough but slower; leave Off for fastest replies.
settings.dataSourcesDesc: Configure external data sources for the backtesting engine.
settings.tushareDesc: China A-share historical data (requires TUSHARE_TOKEN env var).
settings.baostockDesc: Alternative A-share data via TCP protocol (no API key needed).
settings.localApiAccessDesc: For remote or private Web UI deployments, enter the server API key once in this browser. Localhost use can stay blank.
settings.storedInBrowser: Stored only in this browser. Leave blank to clear it.
settings.subtitle: Manage model providers, knowledge retrieval, data access, Agent policy, runtime, and audit surfaces.
settings.llmSettingsDesc: Choose the model used by the agent and save it to the project-local agent/.env file.
settings.modelIdHint: Use the exact model id required by your provider.

security.organizationAdministrationDescription: Enterprise users and roles are managed in the dedicated administration center, separate from personal settings.
security.membersDescription: Manage workspace access for this organization. Owner can invite, change roles, and remove members; Admin can review membership.
security.signInRequired: Sign in to manage organization security.
security.memberPermissionRequired: Member management requires Owner or Admin access.
security.adminReadOnly: Admin can review organization membership. Owner access is required for member changes.

channels.title: IM Channels
channels.description: Start, stop, and inspect configured IM connector runtimes. Disabled or unavailable connectors remain visible for diagnosis.
channels.howToUseBody: Configure the matching section in agent/config.yaml, install the optional package shown in Recovery, start channels, then approve incoming senders with pairing commands before using the Agent from IM.

settings.dataSourceSettingsDesc: Configure optional market data credentials used by backtests and research agents.
settings.loadDataSourceSettingsFailed: Failed to load data source settings: {{message}}
settings.saveDataSourceSettingsFailed: Failed to save data source settings: {{message}}
settings.keepCurrentKey: Leave blank to keep the current key
settings.noApiKeyRequired: This provider does not require an API key.
settings.keepCurrentToken: Leave blank to keep the current token
settings.iwencaiDesc: Used for semantic stock screening via iWenCai (问财). Free access key required.
settings.fredDesc: Used for FRED macroeconomic data (CPI, GDP, unemployment, etc.). Free key from fred.stlouisfed.org.
settings.featureFlagsDesc: Runtime feature flags detected from environment variables.
settings.flagsReadFrom: Flags are read from {{env1}}, {{env2}}, and {{env3}} in {{env_path}}.
settings.modelProviderHint: Choose the provider profile used by Agent runs. Organization-level provider management is planned for the commercial edition.

modelProviders.title: Organization model providers
modelProviders.description: Manage multiple LLM providers for this organization. Agent chats can switch between enabled models per conversation.
modelProviders.empty: No organization model provider yet. Add one on the right to enable model switching in Agent chat.

modelProviderForm.description: Keys are encrypted server-side and are never returned to the browser.
modelProviderForm.priceHint: Enter 0 when provider pricing is not tracked.
modelProviderForm.keepExistingKey: Leave blank to keep existing key
modelProviderForm.deleteWarning: Sessions and agents assigned to this provider will no longer be able to call it. The organization default cannot be deleted.

modelProviderActions.testEmptyResponse: The model completed the request without response text.

navDesc.knowledge: Local RAG index and source documents

memory.title: Persistent memory
memory.description: Review and manage long-term context stored only for your current organization and account.
memory.retentionDescription: Remove personal memories older than the selected retention period.
memory.empty: No persistent memories are stored yet.
memory.loadError: Persistent memory could not be loaded.
memory.saveError: Persistent memory could not be saved.
memory.deleteError: Persistent memory could not be deleted.
memory.purgeError: Expired memories could not be removed.
memory.createDescription: Store an explicit preference, research note, or reusable context for future Agent work.
memory.name: Title

overview.title: System Overview
overview.description: A compact snapshot of model, RAG, and connector readiness for the current deployment.

platformAdmin.forbiddenDescription: This workspace is reserved for system administrators.
platformAdmin.title: Platform administration
platformAdmin.description: Govern users, organizations, knowledge assets, ingestion operations, and system-wide audit activity.
platformAdmin.loadError: Platform operations could not be loaded.
platformAdmin.actionError: The platform action could not be completed.

usageTrend.title: 30-day platform activity
usageTrend.description: Daily token volume and average model latency across all organizations in UTC.

platformAdmin.emptyUsage: No organization model usage has been recorded for the current month.
platformAdmin.deleteKnowledgeConfirm: Delete knowledge base {{name}} and its documents? This cannot be undone.
platformAdmin.emptyRuntimeJobs: No organization-bound runtime jobs are currently recorded.
platformAdmin.emptyArtifacts: No tenant-bound workspace artifacts are currently recorded.
platformAdmin.maintenanceDescription: Run approved maintenance actions with a full platform audit trail.
platformAdmin.maintenanceConfirmBody: The action is recorded in the platform audit log. Database maintenance can briefly delay concurrent writes.

knowledge.title: Knowledge / RAG
knowledge.description: Index durable research notes and reference material into the local retrieval store. Commercial deployments should migrate this path to PostgreSQL + pgvector.
knowledge.pipelineDescription: Files and URLs are parsed into text, chunked, vectorized with the configured embedding provider when available, indexed for keyword retrieval, and returned with stable citations.
knowledge.embeddingFallbackActive: Primary embedding provider {{provider}} is not fully configured or is unavailable; using {{model}} local fallback.
knowledge.noKnowledgeBaseHint: No organization knowledge base exists yet. Create a default one before importing files or URLs.
knowledge.defaultKbDescription: Default knowledge base for research notes, reports, filings, web pages, and strategy references.
knowledge.sourceRequired: Upload a file, enter a server path, or add a URL.
knowledge.fileTypes: Supports PDF, Word, Excel, Markdown, TXT, HTML, CSV, JSON, YAML, and TSV.

data.tushareHint: Only enter a token when updating it. Existing saved tokens are never returned by the API.

agentPolicy.title: Agent Policy
agentPolicy.description: Default Agent behavior is optimized for professional financial research: no emoji, neutral tone, explicit assumptions, citation discipline, and investment risk disclosure.
agentPolicy.toolGovernanceDesc: Control organization tool availability, risk levels, approval requirements, and audit posture.
agentPolicy.signInForToolPolicies: Sign in as Owner or Admin to manage tool policies.

jobs.title: Runtime / Background Jobs
jobs.description: Long-running Agent runs, RAG ingestion, web crawling, and batch backtests should converge on a unified job contract with status, progress, logs, retry, and cancellation.

audit.title: Audit & Usage
audit.description: Commercial deployments should record login, model calls, tool calls, knowledge retrieval, configuration changes, and high-risk operations with request/session/run correlation.

swarmAgents.title: Swarm Agent Management
swarmAgents.description: Edit the specialist agents used by swarm presets. Changes are stored as runtime overrides and apply to new swarm runs.
swarmAgents.formHint: Tools and skills accept comma-separated values. Deleting an agent also removes tasks that depend on it.
swarmAgents.deleteWarning: Preset tasks that depend on this agent will also be removed. This action cannot be undone.

agent.describeGoal: Describe the research goal to attach to this session
agent.placeholder: e.g. Create a dual MA crossover strategy for 000001.SZ, backtest 2024
agent.executablesNotAllowed: Executables and archives are not allowed
agent.failedToSend: Failed to send message, please retry.
agent.readOnlyWorkspace: This workspace is read-only for your role.
agent.failedToContinue: Failed to continue goal, please retry.
agent.evidenceCollectedTitle: Evidence collected toward this research goal

modelPicker.label: Model
modelPicker.title: Switch model
modelPicker.description: Choose an enabled organization model for the next Agent attempt.

runDetail.title: Run Detail
runDetail.runNotFoundDesc: This run is unavailable or you no longer have access to it.
runDetail.noChartDataDesc: The backtest engine may not have generated price data. Check the artifacts/ directory.
runDetail.chartWorkspaceDescription: Load one or more symbols and inspect price, signals, trades, equity, and drawdown.
runDetail.pickSymbolToLoad: Pick a symbol to load chart data.
runDetail.tradeLedgerDescription: Review executed orders, timestamps, prices, quantities, and recorded reasons.
runDetail.artifactInventoryDescription: Inspect generated files, paths, types, sizes, and availability.
runDetail.executionLogsDescription: Review runtime output by source and line while keeping long entries collapsed by default.
runDetail.generatedCodeDescription: Inspect the exact strategy and support files captured for this run.

compare.title: Strategy Comparison
compare.subtitle: Compare two backtest runs across performance, risk, trading activity, and equity behavior.
compare.selectionDescription: Choose two different runs. The second run is measured against the baseline.
compare.runLoadError: Unable to load the selected run.
compare.chartDescription: Inspect normalized equity paths and divergence over the shared sample period.
compare.metricsDescription: Positive delta means the comparison run has a higher raw value; color reflects whether that direction is preferable.
compare.selectTwoRuns: Select two runs to compare their metrics.

correlation.title: Correlation Matrix
correlation.subtitle: Measure co-movement across selected assets to identify concentration and diversification signals.
correlation.configurationDescription: Set the asset universe, lookback window, and correlation method before computing the matrix.
correlation.minAssets: Enter at least two asset codes to compute correlation.
correlation.resultDescription: Hover a cell to inspect the coefficient for the selected asset pair.
correlation.emptyBody: Set at least two asset codes, then compute the matrix to review relationships.

alphaZoo.title: Alpha Zoo
alphaZoo.browseDesc: Browse formula-driven cross-sectional signals from Qlib, the Kakushadze 101 set, GTJA 191, and the academic anomaly literature. Click any alpha to read its formula and source code, or run a bench to score the whole zoo on a universe and period.
alphaZoo.noAlphasMatch: No alphas match the current filters.
alphaZoo.scoreZoo: Score a zoo on a universe
alphaZoo.scoreDesc: Computes IC / IR for every alpha in the selected zoo over the chosen universe and period, then bucketizes them as alive / reversed / dead.
alphaZoo.compareDesc: Benches just the alphas you pick on a universe and period, then ranks them by IC / IR with the gap to the leader — far faster than benching a whole zoo when you only care about a shortlist.
alphaZoo.alphaIdsHint: Separate ids with commas or spaces. Tip: tick alphas in the catalogue and hit "Compare" to prefill this.
alphaZoo.enterAtLeast2: Enter at least 2 distinct alpha ids to compare.
alphaZoo.icPositiveTitle: Share of periods with positive IC
alphaZoo.predictiveHalfLifeTitle: Predictive half-life: trading days before the signal's edge decays

zooCardDesc.qlib158: Microsoft Qlib's full 158-feature library covering momentum, volatility, volume and rolling statistical signals.
zooCardDesc.alpha101: The 101 formulaic alphas from Kakushadze (2015); short-horizon cross-sectional signals.
zooCardDesc.gtja191: Guotai Junan Securities' 191 alphas; technical and microstructure signals tuned to China A-share markets.
zooCardDesc.academic: Curated long-horizon anomalies from the academic literature (value, momentum, quality, low-vol, etc.).

alphaZoo.compareTooltip: Tick 2+ alphas below, then compare them head-to-head
alphaZoo.researchBriefDesc: Compact implementation, universe, and benchmark context for audit-ready factor review.

validation.monteCarloDesc: Shuffled trade order {{n}} times to test if Sharpe is better than random.
validation.bootstrapDesc: Resampled daily returns {{n}} times to estimate {{pct}} confidence interval.
validation.walkForwardDesc: Split into {{n}} sequential windows to check performance consistency.

runnerStatus.connectProfile: Connect this profile to enable connector runtime
runnerStatus.authorizeNote: The connector channel stays read-only until OAuth succeeds and a mandate is committed.
runnerStatus.noActiveMandate: No active mandate. Ask the agent to propose one, then commit it before starting the connector runtime.

mandate.noBroker: Cannot commit mandate: connector broker is missing. Ask the agent to regenerate the proposal.
mandate.adjustPlaceholder: e.g. keep this but raise the daily cap to 10

messageBubble.timeoutHint: Execution timed out. Try simplifying the strategy or reducing the number of assets.
messageBubble.apiFailedHint: API call failed. Please retry later.

pineViewer.footer: TradingView Pine Editor → New blank indicator → Paste code → Add to Chart

home.title: AI-Powered Quant Strategy Research
home.subtitle: Describe a trading strategy in natural language. The agent generates code, runs backtests, and optimizes — all in real time.
home.featureAgentDesc: Natural language strategy generation with ReAct reasoning
home.featureBacktestDesc: Multiple data sources covering A-shares quantitative analysis
home.featureStreamingDesc: Watch the agent think, call tools, and iterate
home.featureReplayDesc: Trade journal analyzer + Shadow Account — extract your rules, backtest them, attribute PnL delta

login.title: Sign in
login.description: Enter your account credentials to continue.

adminCenter.title: Organization administration
adminCenter.description: Manage enterprise users, model providers, Agent teams, knowledge governance, runtime operations, audit, and usage.

users.title: Organization members
users.description: Review membership and assign the minimum role required for each enterprise user.
users.addDescription: Create an organization account and assign its initial role.
users.passwordHint: At least 8 characters. Share it through an approved secure channel.
users.ownerOnly: Only organization owners can add, change, or remove members.
users.searchPlaceholder: Search by name, email, or role
users.removeWarning: The user will lose access to organization conversations, knowledge, models, and reports.

models.title: Model providers
models.description: Manage organization models, encrypted credentials, defaults, availability, and connection tests.

agents.title: Agent teams
agents.description: Create and maintain specialized research Agents, prompts, tools, skills, execution limits, and model assignments.

knowledge.title: Knowledge governance
knowledge.description: Review organization knowledge bases, vector infrastructure, retrieval defaults, and access coverage.
knowledge.empty: No knowledge bases have been created.

runtime.title: Runtime governance
runtime.description: Monitor background Agent, ingestion, crawling, and backtest jobs with controlled retry and cancellation.

audit.title: Audit log
audit.description: Review organization conversations, model usage, and operational events. Conversation content is available only to authorized organization administrators.
audit.searchPlaceholder: Search action, actor, resource, or metadata
audit.empty: No audit events match the current search.
audit.conversationsEmpty: No conversations match the current filters.
audit.messagesEmpty: No stored messages are available for this conversation.
audit.modelCallsEmpty: No model calls have been recorded for this conversation.
audit.sessionEventsEmpty: No linked audit events are available for this conversation.

usage.title: Model usage
usage.description: Review model calls, token volume, estimated provider cost, and latency by model.
usage.empty: No model usage has been recorded.
usage.budgetDescription: Configure conservative organization limits before model calls are dispatched.
usage.unlimitedHint: Set a limit to 0 to leave that guardrail disabled.
usage.budgetOwnerOnly: Only organization owners can change budget limits.
usage.alertsDescription: Threshold events are delivered here once per monthly period and retained in the audit trail.

knowledgeWorkspace.title: Knowledge workspace
knowledgeWorkspace.description: Manage research sources, parsing, chunking, vectorization, retrieval evaluation, and role access in one workspace.
knowledgeWorkspace.loadFailed: Failed to load the knowledge workspace
knowledgeWorkspace.createBaseDescription: Create an organization-scoped source collection with default chunking and hybrid retrieval.
knowledgeWorkspace.noBaseDescription: Create a knowledge base before importing research files or web sources.
knowledgeWorkspace.importDescription: Upload a file, index a web page, or use a server-side path. Knowledge-base defaults are applied automatically.
knowledgeWorkspace.documentTitleHint: Optional. The source name is used when left blank.
knowledgeWorkspace.serverPathHint: For files already available inside the API or worker environment.
knowledgeWorkspace.supportedFormats: PDF, Word, Excel, Markdown, text, HTML, and CSV are supported.
knowledgeWorkspace.documentsEmptyDescription: Import a source to begin parsing, chunking, vectorization, and retrieval evaluation.
knowledgeWorkspace.deleteWarning: The document, chunks, vector data, ingestion history, and related retrieval records will be removed.
knowledgeWorkspace.jobsEmpty: No ingestion jobs have been recorded for this knowledge base.
knowledgeWorkspace.searchDescription: Run the configured retrieval path and inspect ranked chunks, scores, and citations.
knowledgeWorkspace.searchPlaceholder: Enter a policy, company, factor, or research question
knowledgeWorkspace.searchEmpty: Run a query to inspect retrieval quality.
knowledgeWorkspace.chunkingDefaultsDescription: These values are applied automatically unless an import supplies explicit overrides.
knowledgeWorkspace.chunkSizeHint: Target characters per chunk, from 300 to 8,000.
knowledgeWorkspace.chunkOverlapError: Overlap must be smaller than chunk size.
knowledgeWorkspace.retrievalModeHint: Choose how keyword and vector scores are combined.
knowledgeWorkspace.topKHint: Number of chunks returned to the Agent, from 1 to 20.
knowledgeWorkspace.rerankEnabledHint: Apply a local second-stage relevance score after initial retrieval.
knowledgeWorkspace.rerankCandidatesHint: Maximum candidates scored before returning the final top results.
knowledgeWorkspace.localEmbeddingFallback: Provider embeddings are unavailable. New chunks will use {{model}} until the provider is restored.
knowledgeWorkspace.chunkPreviewDescription: Review parsed text and vector metadata without exposing raw vector values.
knowledgeWorkspace.noChunks: No chunks are available for this document.
knowledgeWorkspace.roleAccessDescription: Control which organization roles can retrieve from or modify this knowledge base. Owner access cannot be removed.

evaluation.title: Retrieval evaluation datasets
evaluation.description: Define expected sources for representative questions and measure retrieval quality after configuration changes.
evaluation.emptyDatasets: No evaluation dataset has been created.
evaluation.deleteDatasetWarning: All benchmark cases and historical evaluation runs in this dataset will be removed.
evaluation.casesDescription: Each case records a query and a document expected to appear in the configured top results.
evaluation.deleteCaseDescription: Remove this query from the dataset?
evaluation.emptyCasesDescription: Add representative questions before running an evaluation.
evaluation.selectDatasetDescription: Choose a dataset to inspect benchmark cases and retrieval metrics.

marketData.title: Historical prices and asset comparison
marketData.subtitle: Query standardized OHLCV for equities and crypto, with source provenance, cache status, and completeness details.
marketData.queryDescription: Separate symbols with commas, spaces, or semicolons. Examples: BTC-USDT, AAPL.US, 600519.SH.
marketData.autoDescription: Choose the preferred source per market and fall back when unavailable
marketData.noQueryDescription: Enter assets and a date range to load historical prices.
marketData.twoAssetsDescription: Load two or more symbols to compare normalized performance.

errors.sources: Unable to load the data source catalog.
errors.noSymbols: Enter at least one asset symbol.
errors.invalidDates: The start date must not be after the end date.
errors.noData: No usable bars were returned. Check the symbols or source configuration.

marketData.auditedQueriesDescription: Symbols, query parameters, resolved source, and unresolved assets are retained in the organization audit log.
marketData.truncated: The response was sampled at the chart limit. Narrow the date range to inspect every bar.
marketData.normalizedDescription: Each asset starts at 100 on its first valid close, so different markets and quote currencies can be compared directly.
marketData.registeredSourcesDescription: Availability is checked in the current runtime. Credentialed sources join the fallback chain only after configuration succeeds.
marketData.fallbackDescription: Providers are attempted from left to right.
marketData.cachePolicy: Completed daily requests are shared across users. Requests that include today are refreshed after a short lifetime.

portfolio.title: Portfolio risk
portfolio.subtitle: Read-only account and position snapshot. This workspace cannot place, modify, or cancel orders.
portfolio.loadError: Portfolio data could not be loaded for the selected connection.
portfolio.positionsDescription: {{count}} normalized positions from the configured connection.
portfolio.drawdownUnavailable: Drawdown requires retained holdings snapshots and is not calculated from one broker read.

portfolioSetup.setupDescription: Register a read-only organization connection. Credentials remain in the configured secret manager.
portfolioSetup.profileHint: Used only for a read-only refresh from a configured connector.
portfolioSetup.credentialHint: Use secret://, vault://, or env://. Never paste key material.
portfolioSetup.noConnectionsAdmin: Create a read-only connection before collecting portfolio risk snapshots.
portfolioSetup.noConnectionsMember: An organization administrator must configure a connection before snapshots are available.
portfolioSetup.refreshError: The connection could not be refreshed.
portfolioSetup.setupError: The organization connection could not be created.
